properties.query: SELECT t.student_id, t.student_name, t.course_id, t.course_title, t.midterm_score, t.final_score, t.midterm_35, t.final_35, t.attendance_score, t.assignment_score, t.total_score, CASE WHEN t.total_score IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN t.total_score >= 95 THEN 'A+' WHEN t.total_score >= 90 THEN 'A' WHEN t.total_score >= 85 THEN 'B+' WHEN t.total_score >= 80 THEN 'B' WHEN t.total_score >= 75 THEN 'C+' WHEN t.total_score >= 70 THEN 'C' WHEN t.total_score >= 65 THEN 'D+' WHEN t.total_score >= 60 THEN 'D' ELSE 'F' END AS grade FROM ( SELECT e.user_id AS student_id, u.name AS student_name, e.course_id, c.title AS course_title, ex.midterm_score, ex.final_score, CASE WHEN ex.midterm_score IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(ex.midterm_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) END AS midterm_35, CASE WHEN ex.final_score IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(ex.final_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) END AS final_35, COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) AS attendance_score, asg.assignment_10 AS assignment_score, CASE WHEN ex.midterm_score IS NULL AND ex.final_score IS NULL AND asg.assignment_10 IS NULL AND att.attendance_20 IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND( COALESCE(ex.midterm_score, 0) / 100.0 * 35 + COALESCE(ex.final_score, 0) / 100.0 * 35 + COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) + COALESCE(asg.assignment_10, 0), 2 ) END AS total_score FROM enrollments e JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN exams ex ON ex.student_id = e.user_id AND ex.course_id = e.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.student_id, s.course_id, ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'LATE' THEN 0.5 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'EXCUSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 2 ) AS attendance_20 FROM attendance a JOIN sessions s ON a.session_id = s.id GROUP BY a.student_id, s.course_id ) att ON e.user_id = att.student_id AND e.course_id = att.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sub.student_id, ass.course_id, ROUND(MAX(sub.score) / 100.0 * 15, 2) AS assignment_10 FROM assignment_submissions sub JOIN assignments ass ON sub.assignment_id = ass.id GROUP BY sub.student_id, ass.course_id ) asg ON e.user_id = asg.student_id AND e.course_id = asg.course_id WHERE c.professor_id = ? ) t ORDER BY t.course_id, t.student_name;

SELECT t.student_id, t.student_name, t.course_id, t.course_title, t.midterm_score, t.final_score, t.midterm_35, t.final_35, t.attendance_score, t.assignment_score, t.total_score, CASE WHEN t.total_score IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN t.total_score >= 95 THEN 'A+' WHEN t.total_score >= 90 THEN 'A' WHEN t.total_score >= 85 THEN 'B+' WHEN t.total_score >= 80 THEN 'B' WHEN t.total_score >= 75 THEN 'C+' WHEN t.total_score >= 70 THEN 'C' WHEN t.total_score >= 65 THEN 'D+' WHEN t.total_score >= 60 THEN 'D' ELSE 'F' END AS grade FROM ( SELECT e.user_id AS student_id, u.name AS student_name, e.course_id, c.title AS course_title, ex.midterm_score, ex.final_score, CASE WHEN ex.midterm_score IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(ex.midterm_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) END AS midterm_35, CASE WHEN ex.final_score IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(ex.final_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) END AS final_35, COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) AS attendance_score, asg.assignment_10 AS assignment_score, CASE WHEN ex.midterm_score IS NULL AND ex.final_score IS NULL AND asg.assignment_10 IS NULL AND att.attendance_20 IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND( COALESCE(ex.midterm_score, 0) / 100.0 * 35 + COALESCE(ex.final_score, 0) / 100.0 * 35 + COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) + COALESCE(asg.assignment_10, 0), 2 ) END AS total_score FROM enrollments e JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN exams ex ON ex.student_id = e.user_id AND ex.course_id = e.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.student_id, s.course_id, ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'LATE' THEN 0.5 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'EXCUSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 2 ) AS attendance_20 FROM attendance a JOIN sessions s ON a.session_id = s.id GROUP BY a.student_id, s.course_id ) att ON e.user_id = att.student_id AND e.course_id = att.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sub.student_id, ass.course_id, ROUND(MAX(sub.score) / 100.0 * 15, 2) AS assignment_10 FROM assignment_submissions sub JOIN assignments ass ON sub.assignment_id = ass.id GROUP BY sub.student_id, ass.course_id ) asg ON e.user_id = asg.student_id AND e.course_id = asg.course_id WHERE c.professor_id = ? ) t WHERE t.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%') ORDER BY t.course_id, t.student_name;

SELECT e.student_id, u.name AS student_name, e.course_id, c.title AS course_title, e.midterm_score, e.final_score, COALESCE(sub.score, 0) AS assignment_score FROM exams e JOIN users u ON e.student_id = u.id JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sub.student_id, ass.course_id, MAX(sub.score) AS score FROM assignment_submissions sub JOIN assignments ass ON sub.assignment_id = ass.id GROUP BY sub.student_id, ass.course_id ) sub ON e.student_id = sub.student_id AND e.course_id = sub.course_id WHERE c.professor_id = ? ORDER BY c.title, u.name
UPDATE exams SET midterm_score = ? WHERE student_id = ? AND course_id = ?
UPDATE exams SET final_score = ? WHERE student_id = ? AND course_id = ?
UPDATE assignment_submissions sub JOIN assignments ass ON sub.assignment_id = ass.id SET sub.score = ? WHERE sub.student_id = ? AND ass.course_id = ?

SELECT t.student_id, t.student_name, t.course_id, t.course_title, t.midterm_score, t.final_score, t.midterm_35, t.final_35, t.attendance_score, t.assignment_score, t.total_score, CASE WHEN t.total_score IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN t.total_score >= 95 THEN 'A+' WHEN t.total_score >= 90 THEN 'A' WHEN t.total_score >= 85 THEN 'B+' WHEN t.total_score >= 80 THEN 'B' WHEN t.total_score >= 75 THEN 'C+' WHEN t.total_score >= 70 THEN 'C' WHEN t.total_score >= 65 THEN 'D+' WHEN t.total_score >= 60 THEN 'D' ELSE 'F' END AS grade FROM ( SELECT e.user_id AS student_id, u.name AS student_name, e.course_id, c.title AS course_title, ex.midterm_score, ex.final_score, CASE WHEN ex.midterm_score IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(ex.midterm_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) END AS midterm_35, CASE WHEN ex.final_score IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(ex.final_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) END AS final_35, COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) AS attendance_score, asg.assignment_10 AS assignment_score, CASE WHEN ex.midterm_score IS NULL AND ex.final_score IS NULL AND asg.assignment_10 IS NULL AND att.attendance_20 IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND( COALESCE(ex.midterm_score, 0) / 100.0 * 35 + COALESCE(ex.final_score, 0) / 100.0 * 35 + COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) + COALESCE(asg.assignment_10, 0), 2 ) END AS total_score FROM enrollments e JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN exams ex ON ex.student_id = e.user_id AND ex.course_id = e.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.student_id, s.course_id, ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'LATE' THEN 0.5 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'EXCUSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 2 ) AS attendance_20 FROM attendance a JOIN sessions s ON a.session_id = s.id GROUP BY a.student_id, s.course_id ) att ON e.user_id = att.student_id AND e.course_id = att.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sub.student_id, ass.course_id, ROUND(MAX(sub.score) / 100.0 * 15, 2) AS assignment_10 FROM assignment_submissions sub JOIN assignments ass ON sub.assignment_id = ass.id GROUP BY sub.student_id, ass.course_id ) asg ON e.user_id = asg.student_id AND e.course_id = asg.course_id WHERE e.user_id = ? ) t ORDER BY t.course_id;

SELECT sub.student_id, u.name AS student_name, a.course_id, c.title AS course_title FROM assignment_submissions sub JOIN assignments a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id JOIN courses c ON a.course_id = c.id JOIN users u ON sub.student_id = u.id WHERE c.professor_id = ? AND sub.score IS NULL ORDER BY c.title, u.name
UPDATE assignment_submissions sub JOIN assignments a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id SET sub.score = ? WHERE sub.student_id = ? AND a.course_id = ? AND sub.score IS NULL
